ops.text: Focus-deck step count disagrees with the submit tally on the same screen. In focus mode two independently computed totals render simultaneously: the deck header's "Step N / M" + dot rail use `steps.length` including note-only context steps (`web/src/components/FocusProgress.tsx:10-50#sd95`), while the `SubmitBar` below computes `submitItems().length` from `BUILTIN_TALLIED`, counting only approvals/choices/interactive pack blocks — `input` excluded too (`web/src/components/SubmitBar.tsx:38-45#c8k6`, `web/src/decide.ts:20-50#weaq`). The two rails disagree by construction: 2 approvals plus note sections shows "Step 3 / 5" above a "1/2 decided" strip, leaving it unclear which number means "how much is left." No test renders the two components together to assert agreement (`web/src/focus.test.ts` covers step shape only; nothing covers `FocusProgress`).
